scenarios.name: Fine-tune Qwen2.5-3B-Instruct on the Bitext customer-support Kaggle dataset on a 16GB GPU
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses `kaggle datasets download -d bitext/bitext-gen-ai-chatbot-customer-support-dataset -p ./data --unzip`, converts CSV to JSONL with messages format, configures BitsAndBytesConfig(load_in_4bit=True, nf4, bfloat16), LoRA r=16 alpha=32 on q/k/v/o_proj, SFTTrainer with batch=2 grad_accum=8 epochs=3 lr=2e-4 fp16; baseline uses generic HF training without the 4-bit + LoRA target_modules pattern.

scenarios.name: Prepare a Kaggle mental-health FAQ dataset for CPU fine-tuning
scenarios.rationale: Treatment searches with `kaggle datasets list -s "mental health FAQ" --sort-by votes`, picks Qwen2.5-1.5B-Instruct for CPU, sets batch=1 grad_accum=16 max_seq_length=256 load_in_4bit=True, and converts FAQ pairs into the documented JSONL messages format; baseline picks a generic small model without the VRAM-based selection rule or the documented preprocessing function.
